mapper.select: /* wms-master-customerItem-sql-oracle.xml - selectCustomerItemCount */ SELECT count(1) FROM TWORK_MST_STORE_IC A

/* wms-master-customerItem-sql-oracle.xml - selectCustomerItemList */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP} SELECT '0' AS CHK , A.CTKEY , B.CTNAME , A.OWKEY , C.OWNAME , A.STORE_KEY , D.STORE_NAME , A.ICKEY , E.ICNAME , E.SHELFDAY , WELLFOOD.FN_GET_STORE_IC_MIN_EXPIRE(A.CTKEY, A.OWKEY, A.STORE_KEY, A.ICKEY) AS MIN_EXPIREDATE , A.MINEXPIRESTD , A.SAFESTOCKYN , A.PLTBOXDELIGBCD , A.PLTDELIGBCD , A.WRAPPEDYN , A.INSERTDATE , A.INSERTURKEY , A.UPDATEDATE , A.UPDATEURKEY FROM TWORK_MST_STORE_IC A LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_CT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_OW C ON A.OWKEY = C.OWKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_STORE D ON A.CTKEY = D.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY AND A.STORE_KEY = D.STORE_KEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_IC E ON A.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = E.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = E.ICKEY
ORDER BY A.UPDATEDATE DESC #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
